text: Relation: A Relation is a mathematical relation that specifies how two or more mathematical objects are connected.
ssml: <speak version="1.0" xml:lang="en-US" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2001/10/synthesis"><voice name="en-US-JennyNeural"><prosody rate="-8%" pitch="+1st" volume="medium">Relation:<break time="320ms"/> A Relation is a mathematical relation that specifies how two or more mathematical objects are connected.</prosody></voice></speak>
